boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Clearance CLR-TES-074 provides exact match for Tessa Medical GmbH (Germany, DE-4481, account 7205). The disposition monitor-only no-block per STD-TES-074-P permits release when exact counterparty and account match exist. FLAG-TES-074 applies to distinct Belarus entity Tessa Medica LLC and does not block this payment.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 controls by exact match of Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, 7205 and monitor-only no-block disposition per STD-TES-074-P.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Entity mismatch between German GmbH and Belarus LLC resolves the dependency. No blocking condition exists under CLR-TES-074 and STD-TES-074-P. Escalation is not required.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Source boundary closed by exact match of critical terms (legal name, country, tax ID, account) and permitting disposition before execution. FLAG-TES-074 vs CLR-TES-074 dependency resolved through entity differentiation.

critical_features_preserved: Exact match verification for Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, 7205
Monitor-only no-block disposition as permitting rule
Entity mismatch between Germany GmbH and Belarus LLC as non-blocking
final_answer: ALLOW. The payment of USD 68900 to Tessa Medical GmbH may proceed. Clearance CLR-TES-074 provides exact match for the counterparty, country DE-4481, and account 7205. The monitor-only no-block disposition per STD-TES-074-P permits release under these exact-match conditions. FLAG-TES-074 applies to Tessa Medica LLC (Belarus), a distinct entity, and does not block this payment. Source boundary is closed.
